scope_note: One card per surrogate lane that appears on a public surface. Statuses: promoted (usable, evidence-linked), deprecated_scoped (kept only behind the deprecation guard), fail_closed_stub (public stub, no trained model), retrain_blocked (usable weights exist, retraining blocked on a named decision). Every anchor is verified against the tree by the generator; a removed model, guard, or evidence artifact breaks the drift check.

cards.description: QLKNN-10D-style neural transport surrogate with gyro-Bohm scaling: MLP flux prediction over 10 local parameters, used by the integrated transport lane.

training_provenance.summary: Weights derive from the published QLKNN-10D dataset lineage (van de Plassche et al., Phys. Plasmas 27, 022310 (2020)); the repository downloads published weights and does not retrain them locally.

calibration.summary: Uncertainty envelope benchmark propagates surrogate spread through the transport lane and gates envelope statistics; QLKNN validation compares against published benchmark rows.

ood.mechanism: Per-input z-score against training-domain statistics; batch masks at 3-sigma (soft, reported fraction) and 5-sigma (hard flag) exposed in the runtime diagnostics.

fallback.summary: Analytic critical-gradient transport model; the runtime reports backend=analytic_fallback whenever weights are absent or rejected, so the lane never silently returns neural output without loaded weights.

retraining.summary: No in-repo retraining; weights refresh means re-downloading published artifacts via the download tool with checksum verification.

gaps: OOD thresholds are z-score heuristics, not validated against a held-out OOD set.
No conformal or ensemble calibration of per-channel flux uncertainties.

cards.description: Disruption risk lane: transformer-based predictor (torch-gated) plus the hybrid anomaly detector runtime used by replay and threshold campaigns.

training_provenance.summary: Shot-level manifests with leakage-guarded train/validation/holdout splits over the labelled DIII-D shot inventory; the split guard runs in preflight.

calibration.summary: Risk-calibration artifact regenerated and drift-checked from the labelled shots; the hard operational gate binds the false-positive rate.

ood.mechanism: No explicit feature-space OOD detector; the operational guards are the calibrated risk thresholds, the leakage-guarded splits, and the hard disruption false-positive-rate gate in CI.

fallback.summary: Mitigation triggering is contract-based and independent of the ML lane: critical physics-invariant violations (including non-finite observables) trigger mitigation regardless of predictor output.

retraining.summary: Retraining reuses the manifested shot splits; transfer/generalisation behaviour is benchmarked in the disruption transfer campaign.

gaps: No feature-space OOD detector on diagnostic inputs; detection relies on threshold calibration.
Torch-gated predictor lane lacks per-prediction uncertainty output (point risk only).

cards.description: Pretrained ITPA confinement MLP surrogate shipped with coverage metadata for the confinement-time lane.

training_provenance.summary: Trained on the bundled ITPA H-mode confinement rows; coverage manifest records the training domain.

calibration.summary: Benchmarked against the ITPA rows in the pretrained-surrogates benchmark report.

ood.mechanism: Coverage-manifest domain bounds; queries outside the recorded training coverage are flagged by the coverage metadata rather than a learned detector.

fallback.summary: The physics lane retains the IPB98(y,2) scaling as the non-surrogate confinement path; the surrogate is additive, not a replacement.

retraining.summary: Deterministic in-repo retraining from the bundled ITPA CSV via the training entry point.

gaps: Coverage bounds are descriptive; no quantitative extrapolation penalty is applied by the MLP lane itself.

training_provenance.summary: Legacy JET-image FNO training path retained for reproducibility of historical results only.

calibration.summary: None current; the lane is deprecated and excluded from promoted claims.

ood.mechanism: None; the deprecation guard prevents the lane from becoming a default or public release path.

fallback.summary: Not applicable — the lane is not on any default path; the guard enforces this in preflight.

retraining.summary: External retraining request export exists for a potential supervised refresh; no local retraining.

gaps: Deprecated by policy; stays scoped behind tools/deprecated_default_lane_guard.py.

cards.description: TGLF surrogate bridge: dataset generation scaffolding for a future TGLF-trained transport surrogate.

training_provenance.summary: Dataset generator exists; no trained weights are shipped, and no surrogate claim is made.

calibration.summary: Not applicable until a real fit lands (master-plan F-7).

fallback.summary: The canonical TGLF path resolves through the GK registry (external binary preferred, native fallback); the bridge is not on that path.

gaps: Real TGLF-trained fit pending (master-plan F-7); the lane stays fail-closed until then.

cards.description: ITER equilibrium surrogate with validated shipped weights; the B.7 GPU retrain remains blocked.

training_provenance.summary: Shipped weights validated against the recorded weight-validation report; provenance of the original training run is embedded there.

calibration.summary: Weight-validation report records the acceptance checks for the shipped artifact.

ood.mechanism: None beyond the training-domain description in the validation report.

fallback.summary: The production equilibrium path is the multigrid/SOR solver stack; the surrogate is not a default lane.

retraining.summary: B.7 GPU retrain is blocked on the compute-budget decision (CEO); the external retrain request export documents the required job.

gaps: B.7 retrain blocked on compute budget (CEO decision); no OOD detector; no uncertainty output.
